menuItems.name: Sicilian Pistachio Perfetto
menuItems.desc: Shun the neon green factory chemicals. Spun from pure, stone-ground Bronte pistachios imported directly from Sicily. Earthy sage color, roasted nutty aroma, and dense velvety silk.

menuItems.name: Stracciatella Tradizionale
menuItems.desc: The crown jewel of Bergamo. Fresh morning organic California sweet cream slow-churned and drizzled with molten dark Valrhona chocolate that shatters into delicate, crunchy shards upon contact with la spatola.

menuItems.name: Amarena Cherry & Dark Valrhona
menuItems.desc: Rich fior di latte cream marbled with wild, tart Amarena cherries candied in Bologna, paired with deep French cocoa nibs. A sophisticated balance of sweet creaminess and dark fruit acidity.

menuItems.name: Double Valrhona Chocolate Chip
menuItems.desc: Intense, dark 70% Valrhona chocolate emulsion folded with thick dark chocolate chunks. Decadent, silky, and profoundly rich without the artificial sweetness of commercial chocolate ice cream.

menuItems.name: HB Pier Cookies & Sweet Cream
menuItems.desc: Our artisanal elevate on a childhood staple. Daily spun organic sweet cream folded generously with crushed dark chocolate sandwich biscuits. Silky smooth peaks with satisfying textural crunch.

menuItems.name: Pacific Sea Salt Caramel
menuItems.desc: Slow-cooked burnt sugar caramel churned into dense cream, finished with crunchy flakes of coarse Pacific ocean salt. Perfectly balanced recovery fuel after a long surf session.

menuItems.name: Tiramisu Tradizionale
menuItems.desc: Rich mascarpone gelato layered with savoiardi ladyfingers soaked in bold LaVazza espresso and Sicilian Marsala wine, dusted heavily with raw French cocoa powder.

menuItems.name: Gianduja (Piedmont Hazelnut Chocolate)
menuItems.desc: The quintessential Northern Italian pairing of imported IGP Piedmont hazelnuts ground into silky paste and blended with smooth milk chocolate.

menuItems.name: Pacific Coast Mango Sorbetto
menuItems.desc: Zero dairy, zero fat, zero cholesterol. Churned exclusively from ripe Alphonso mangos and pure spring water. Incredibly creamy emulsion that rivals dairy ice cream without weighing down your beach day.

menuItems.name: Aliso Canyon Honey & Sea Salt
menuItems.desc: Locally harvested wildflower honey from Orange County canyons folded into buttery caramel gelato, finished with crunchy flakes of Pacific sea salt. The ultimate savory-sweet surf recovery pairing.

menuItems.name: Raspberry Champagne Sorbetto
menuItems.desc: Tart Pacific Northwest red raspberries churned with crisp dry California bubbly. Highly recommended by local foodie reviewers for its refreshing, effervescent sunset finish.

menuItems.name: Tropical Passion Fruit Sorbetto
menuItems.desc: Bright, tangy, and intensely aromatic tropical passion fruit pulp spun with pure spring water. Incredibly refreshing palate cleanser on a hot beach day.

menuItems.name: Limone Siciliano Sorbetto
menuItems.desc: Zesty, vibrant organic yellow lemons imported from Southern Italy. Crisp, clean acidity that cuts right through summer beach heat.

menuItems.name: The HB LaVazza Affogato
menuItems.desc: A double shot of bold, freshly extracted Italian LaVazza espresso poured steaming hot over two bespoke scoops of Fior di Latte or Double Valrhona Chocolate. Hot meets frozen in sensory perfection.
